title: Stone of Good Luck (Luckstone)
summary: While this polished agate is on your person, you gain a +1 bonus to ability checks and saving throws.

contentBlocks.text: Stone of Good Luck (Luckstone) Wondrous item, uncommon (requires attunement)
While this polished agate is on your person, you gain a +1 bonus to ability checks and saving throws.
